debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
𝓒 : Finset (Set α)

B : Set α
hB : B ∈ ↑𝓒
hAB :
  Subtype.val '' (Subtype.val ⁻¹' symmDiff A (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B)) = Subtype.val '' (Subtype.val ⁻¹' symmDiff B (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B))
this : symmDiff (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B
⊢ A = B

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:

  have hAB' :

  have hB' : B ⊆ ⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A := Set.subset_iUnion₂_of_subset B hB (by rfl)

  have hBi : ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B ⊆ B := Set.iInter₂_subset_of_subset B hB (by rfl)

  by_cases hxU : x ∈ ⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A

    have hx :
